---
name: Research case request
about: Propose a public-safe research case study or demo case
title: "[Case]: "
labels: case-study, feedback
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the research case or demo case.

## Expected Behavior

What should the case help users understand?

## Actual / Current Gap

What is missing from the current public demos or case studies?

## Data Sensitivity

- Data category: public demo / public dataset / private research / restricted data / unknown
- Can the case be fully public-safe? yes / no / unsure
- Does it require raw data? yes / no
- Does it require private local paths? yes / no
- Does it require restricted model files? yes / no
- Does it require advisor private feedback? yes / no

## Reproduction Steps Or Materials

List public-safe files, papers, docs, or fake/demo materials that can reproduce
the case. Do not upload private data.

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version:
- Live mode enabled: yes / no
- Plugins enabled: yes / no

## Safety / Privacy Notes

- Do not upload API keys, tokens, `.env` files, or credentials.
- Do not upload raw data.
- Do not upload SMPL-X model files or other restricted model payloads.
- Do not upload private local paths.
- Do not claim experiment success unless evidence is public and reviewable.

## Screenshots / Logs Optional

Attach only public-safe screenshots or logs.

## Checklist

- [ ] I can describe this case without private data.
- [ ] I did not include secrets or API keys.
- [ ] I did not include raw data.
- [ ] I did not include restricted model files.
- [ ] I did not include unsupported observed-result claims.
